summary: Iteration 1 — Tested Sprinter sample app + Admin image manager (backend + frontend). 18/18 backend pytest tests passed. All admin auth, image CRUD, file upload to Emergent object storage, and file serving via /api/files/{path} verified. Frontend: Sprinter route /app/sprinter renders with tabs (Home/Train/Fuel/Recover) functional and content present. Admin login flow (wrong/correct password, toast, redirect, logout, auth-gate redirect) all working. Admin /admin/images shows all 9 slots, URL override and Reset work; URL override propagates to landing page hero within ~3s as designed.
critical_code_review_comments: Admin token check uses secrets.compare_digest — good (timing-attack safe).
POST /api/admin/images/url accepts the URL as a query param (?url=...). For long/encoded URLs this is fine but a JSON body would be cleaner; not blocking.
init_storage() catches a soft failure on startup so backend stays up even if Emergent storage init defers — graceful.
useImages.js cache invalidation is global; works well, no leak.
test_credentials: Admin password: builtforyou2026 ; Admin token: bfy-admin-7f3e9d2b8c1a4e5f6a8b9c0d1e2f3a4b (auto-set on login, stored in localStorage as bfy_admin_token).
seed_data_creation: None. Test data uses TEST_ prefix (TEST_card_sprinter, TEST_reset_key, TEST_upload_key) and is cleaned up by the session fixture.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py cover health, admin auth (login/verify/wrong password/no token/wrong token), images (list/set-url/upload/reset/reject-non-image/auth-required), waitlist (count, idempotent create), and plans stub (create+get, 404). Frontend was tested end-to-end via Playwright: sprinter route, sprinter tabs, admin login (wrong+correct), 9 admin image slots, URL override propagation to landing hero, reset, logout, and auth gate. Plan generation is a known stub — not deep-tested. Storage upload to Emergent works.
rca of the issue: No bugs found. One Playwright timing artefact in the first run reported 'missing slots' because slot presence was checked before AdminImages' /admin/verify call resolved (page still showed 'Loading…'). Re-verified with proper wait_for_selector — all 9 slots render correctly. Not a product bug.
